case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. KENNETH ZHANG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2009
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS REGARDING BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, KENNETH
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED JAN-15-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, KENNETH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, KENNETH $1,983.86 PRINCIPAL, $256.54 INTEREST, $235.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,475.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
